creator: motoom@xs4all.nl
text:
In the SEE ALSO section of the gif(4) manpage, a defunct URL is mentioned:

  ftp://ftp.isi.edu/in-notes/rfc2893.txt

Fix: 

Change the URL to:

  http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2893.txt

in /usr/src/share/man/man4/gif.4
How-To-Repeat: Point your browser to ftp://ftp.isi.edu/in-notes/rfc2893.txt

This document is not available anymore (No such directory "in-notes")
